title: HAL Hyderabad – Apprentices – 132 Posts
org: Technician (Diploma) Apprentice, Engineering Graduate Apprentice, General Stream Graduate Apprentice
shortInfo: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL Hyderabad) Recruitment 2026 for 132 posts of Apprentices. Candidates with Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma Can attend the walkin. The Walk-in starts from 02-06-2026, and ends on 05-06-2026. For detailed information please visit HAL Hyderabad official website, hal-india.co.in.

basic_details.job_title: Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd Hyderabad Apprentices Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 132 Diploma, Engineer, Graduate Apprentices Posts
basic_details.short_information: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL Hyderabad) Recruitment 2026 for 132 posts of Apprentices. Candidates with Any Graduate, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma Can attend the walkin. The Walk-in starts from 02-06-2026, and ends on 05-06-2026. For detailed information please visit HAL Hyderabad official website, hal-india.co.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Department of Training & Development, Avionics Division, HAL Hyderabad
basic_details.post_name: Technician (Diploma) Apprentice, Engineering Graduate Apprentice, General Stream Graduate Apprentice

selection_process: Merit-based on CGPA/Percentage of marks in Diploma/Engineering Degree/Graduation in General Stream. No written test or interview.
how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates must walk-in on the respective date as per the category/discipline-wise schedule at Utsav Sadan Auditorium, Behind Department of Training & Development, Hindustan Aeronautics Limited, Avionics Division, Balanagar, Hyderabad – 500042. There is no separate online application on the HAL website. Candidates must pre-register on the NATS portal at https://nats.education.gov.in before attending the walk-in interview.
